root_cause: Cluster autoscaler failed to add nodes for a Pending pod
evidence: Scheduler reported insufficient capacity: 0/6 nodes are available: 6 Insufficient cpu, 6 Insufficient memory.
Cluster autoscaler reported NotTriggerScaleUp: pod didn't trigger scale-up: 1 max node group size reached, 1 node group would not fit pod
No successful Scheduled event observed after autoscaler failure

causes.message: Scheduler could not place the Pod on existing nodes because cluster capacity was insufficient
Cluster autoscaler did not add nodes for the Pending Pod
Pod remains Pending because the required replacement capacity was not provisioned

pod:checkout-api-7f6c7c89f6-r9l4m: Pod is Pending after scheduler capacity rejection and autoscaler scale-up failure
Scheduler message: 0/6 nodes are available: 6 Insufficient cpu, 6 Insufficient memory.
controller:cluster-autoscaler: NotTriggerScaleUp: pod didn't trigger scale-up: 1 max node group size reached, 1 node group would not fit pod
configmap:cluster-autoscaler-status: Cluster-autoscaler status at 2026-05-16 09:05:00 +0000 UTC: ScaleUp: NoActivity (max node group size reached for prod-workers); ScaleDown: NoCandidates

likely_causes: Node group or cloud provider quota prevents scale-up
Cluster autoscaler reached the node group maximum size
No scalable node group can fit the pod's requested CPU, memory, pods, or ephemeral storage
Cloud provider node provisioning is failing or in backoff
suggested_checks: kubectl -n kube-system get configmap cluster-autoscaler-status -o yaml
Check node group max size, cloud quota, and autoscaler backoff events
